description: Local-first MCP server and CLI that records deterministic evidence for installed TypeScript APIs and repository-local OpenAPI/JSON contracts, then revalidates receipts in CI.

notes: The local stdio server requires no authentication or API keys.

clients: other MCP clients with stdio support

notes: Metadata matches the public v0.3.3 server manifest, package metadata, MCP implementation, and setup documentation.
